name: california-inyo
description: Inyo County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Inyo County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Inyo County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Inyo County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Inyo County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Inyo County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-inyo-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-inyo-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
Representatives are listed within the 'superfish-main' menu structure under the 'Board of Supervisors' section, specifically in links like 'District 1', 'District 2', etc.
The 'name' field can be extracted from the text content of the anchor tags (<a>) within the 'sf-depth-3' list items.
The 'detailUrl' corresponds to the 'href' attribute of the anchor tags representing each supervisor.
The 'photoUrl' is found in tags with class 'img-responsive', often containing relative paths starting with '/sites/default/files/'.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Inyo County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Inyo County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Inyo County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Inyo County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — No NetFile portal found for Inyo; small county. Verify with elections.inyocounty.us.
